text:
76 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
from the curse of the Sadhus in the previous birth and experienced loss of
brothers and sons in this life.
The native will be a good soul with faith and devotion to God and fully
engaged in agriculture (Ketu between the Moon and Jupiter-Mars and Saturn
exchange of Places). When, Jupiter transits Venus at about 20th year, the
native will become very rich (by exchange Venus comes to second house of
Saturn's placement). He will be married at this age and live upto 70 or 80
years.
CHART 419
Nandikeswara informs Marken
deya that the native of this chart will Jupt Mer.
Sat
have Vishnu line as well as Mani Dt Sun
malikn in his palm. He will develop Ven.
an avenue of big trees offering shade Moon
and shelter to travellers. Here Mercury
and the Sun are in Gemini, Venus and Mars
the Moon in Cancer and Mars in Leo.
This indicates a man of learning
Dh.
though his educational qualifications
are not above average. He will be
deeply attached to women-folk.
